title: theobroma bernoullii subsp. bernoullii
intro: Theobroma bernoullii subsp. bernoullii is a subspecies of the Theobroma bernoullii plant, which is a species of tree in the cacao family (Malvaceae). It is native to the tropical rainforests of South America and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's seeds, leaves, and bark have been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Theobroma bernoullii subsp. bernoullii, such as infusions and decoctions, are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
